config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 07/05/2024
		Purpose: If previous page not logged in then revert to login page. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		#Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsErrorProofingConfigurationQGAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.print("New Session")
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='ErrorProofing Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Configuration/ErProofQG')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> ErProofQG')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 07/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update data on row selection. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
		selectedRow = self.props.selection.selectedRow
		pydata = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(self.props.data)
		countWI = 0
		if(len(pydata) > 0):
			for rows in range(len(pydata)):
				if(selectedRow == rows):
					Id = pydata[rows]['ID']
					AreaId= pydata[rows]['AreaID']
					Area= pydata[rows]['AreaName']
					LineId= pydata[rows]['LineId']
					Line= pydata[rows]['LineName']
					WorkStationId= pydata[rows]['WorkstationId']
					WorkStation= pydata[rows]['WorkStationName']
					BOM= pydata[rows]['BOMName']
					BOMId= pydata[rows]['BOMId']
					Part = pydata[rows]['PartName']
					PartId = pydata[rows]['PartId']
					IsActive = pydata[rows]['IsActive']
					ALTERNATEPART = pydata[rows]['ALTERNATEPART']
					system.perspective.print("ALTERNATEPART from db table:%s"%ALTERNATEPART)
#					system.perspective.print({'UnitId':UnitId,'UnitName':str(name),'UnitDescription':str(desc),'UnitLevel':levelId,'AttachedTo':attachedId,'isActive':isActive,'IPAddress':ipAddress,'WorkStationTypeId':WorkStationTypeId})
					break	

		headerLabel = "Edit"
		messageType = 'ErrorProofPanelQG'
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'BOM':BOMId,'AreaId':AreaId,'LineId':LineId,'WorkStationId':WorkStationId,'Part':PartId,'IsActive': IsActive,'UnitId':Id,'ALTERNATEPART':ALTERNATEPART}			
		system.perspective.print("payload in tblErProof %s"%payload)
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page')

		folderName = 'Project_VECV/ErrorProofQG'
		colName = 'ID' ## Need to change
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1,"id":int(Id),"folder":str(folderName),"colName":str(colName)}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")


	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='ErrorProof Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/ErrorProofConfigurationQG')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/TabContainer/cntTable/tblErrorProofQG')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print(str(description) + '  ' + str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 07/05/2024
		Purpose: make table refersh and reset in panel. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	try:
		self.refreshBinding("props.data")
		self.session.custom.type='Add'
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'ErrorProofPanel' 
		Action = "Save"		 			
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'BOM':-1,'AreaId':-1,'LineId':-1,'WorkStationId':-1,'Part':-1,'Description':'','IsActive': 1,'UnitId':0}
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page')

	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	except: 
	#start of except block 
		screenName ='ErrorProofing Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/ErrProof')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root->tblErPrrof->MessageHandler')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 07/05/2024
		Purpose: remove selection on double click and make reset in panel. 
	"""
	try:
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblErProof").props.selection.selectedRow = -1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblErProof").props.selection.selectedColumn = ''
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")  
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'ErrorProofPanelQG'
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'BOM':-1,'AreaId':-1,'LineId':-1,'WorkStationId':-1,'Part':-1,'IsActive': -1}		 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	except:
		screenName ='ErrorProofing Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Configuration/ErProofQG')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root  -> ErProofQG')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
